query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A black background scattered with thin vertical lines of light in varying lengths and brightness, including a longer, more luminous vertical streak positioned near the lower right corner. No other discernible subjects, objects, or scenery are visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily grainy, abstract photograph employing extreme underexposure that crushes almost the entire frame into deep black shadow, leaving visible only scattered thin vertical light streaks of varying lengths and intensities alongside a thicker, brighter vertical streak near the lower right corner. The composition abandons representational clarity in favor of formal qualities of line and darkness, while prominent film grain texture introduces organic imperfection and a tactile, archival quality across the dark surface.
